title: Spring Builder Summit
excerpt: A strategy-focused summit for custom builders and growth-minded teams.
content: Join regional builders, marketers, and operations leaders for a practical day of sessions focused on growth, lead quality, and better project workflows.
speaker: Rick Anderson

title: Luxury Homes Design Workshop
excerpt: A hands-on workshop centered on current luxury design decisions and finish selections.
content: Explore high-end design preferences, finish trends, and layout moves that matter most to today's luxury homeowner.
speaker: Emily Carter

title: Remodeling Trends 2026
excerpt: A forward-looking event on remodeling demand, pricing, and design direction.
content: This session covers what is shaping the remodeling market in 2026, including homeowner demand, budget expectations, and project planning shifts.
speaker: Daniel Brooks

title: Contractor Networking Night
excerpt: An evening event for contractors, trades, and builders to connect and share referrals.
content: A relaxed networking night designed to build stronger local relationships between contractors, builders, and specialist trade partners.
speaker: Michael Torres

title: Energy Efficient Homes Expo
excerpt: An expo focused on smarter, more energy-efficient building solutions.
content: Explore the latest systems, materials, and construction methods helping builders deliver more energy-efficient homes without sacrificing comfort or design.
speaker: Sarah Whitman
